_title: KS 1700:2018 — Code of Practice for Electrical Wiring of Buildings
_legal_mandate: Kenyan Standards Act Cap 496 — KEBS publishes KS 1700 as the mandatory wiring code; EPRA enforces via inspection regime
_revision_cycle: 5-year cycle; next revision expected 2024 (placeholder until KEBS publication confirmed)
_verification_note: This entire KS1700/ layer is authored by structural derivation from BS 7671:2018+A2 (which KS 1700:2018 adopts substantially per Annex E). Kenya-specific deviations are sourced from KEBS bulletins and engineering practice in Kenya. Promote verification_status to 'verified-against-source' after clause-by-clause check against the published KS 1700:2018 PDF.
note: Always verify against the current purchased copy from KEBS. This file reflects KS 1700:2018 first edition.
scope: Design, erection, verification and inspection of electrical installations in buildings and similar structures in Kenya. Excludes supply networks (KPLC infrastructure), traction systems, mines, and explosive atmospheres.

structure.annex_c: Cable colour identification (matches BS 7671 Appendix 7 harmonised colours)
structure.annex_f: Local supply context — KPLC voltage tolerances, frequency, fault levels
structure.annex_g: Climate-adjusted ambient temperature baselines per Kenya climate zone
structure.annex_h: Kenya-specific cable types and KEBS-certified equipment

key_references_in_this_folder.reg411-disconnection-times.json: §411 — maximum earth fault loop impedance and disconnection times (adopts BS 7671 Tables 41.1 + 41.2 + 41.3 verbatim)
key_references_in_this_folder.reg411-rcd-requirements.json: §411.3.3 — RCD requirements (KS extends socket-RCD universally; KS-deviation from pre-AMD2 BS)
key_references_in_this_folder.appendix4-cable-ratings.json: §Appendix 4 (KS Annex E) — cable current ratings (adopts BS Tables 4D verbatim)
key_references_in_this_folder.appendix12-voltage-drop.json: §Appendix 12 — voltage drop limits (adopts BS Appendix 12 verbatim)
key_references_in_this_folder.annex-E-bs7671-adoption-table.json: KS-unique — canonical clause-by-clause adoption map of BS 7671 by KS 1700
key_references_in_this_folder.ks-unique-deviations.json: KS-unique — Kenya-specific deviations from BS 7671 baseline
